sensory_synthesis.interpretation: The system is experiencing high drift and inconsistent current readings, which could indicate a navigation error. The battery level is high, so power is not an immediate concern. The shallow depth and low navigation error suggest the system is not in a critical location. The slight negative velocity and off-position indicate the system is not on course.
